Widgets.WidgetGroup: <WidgetItem name="frame" example="" summary="Frame layout internal controls will be arranged in any overlapping arrangement" type="DOUBLE" /> <WidgetItem name="vertical" example="" summary="Vertical layout Internal controls will be arranged vertically" type="DOUBLE" /> <WidgetItem name="horizontal" example="" summary="Horizontal layout The internal controls will be arranged horizontally" type="DOUBLE" /> <WidgetItem name="list" example="" summary="List layout is used to present list data equivalent to Android RecyclerView" type="DOUBLE" /> <WidgetItem name="drawer" example="" summary="Slippage layout can pull out the page from the side" type="DOUBLE" /> <WidgetItem name="linear" example="" summary="Linear layout The internal controls will be arranged horizontally or vertically linearly" type="DOUBLE" /> <WidgetItem name="relative" example="" summary="Relative layout internal controls can be set relative to other controls" type="DOUBLE" /> <WidgetItem name="drawer" example="" summary="Drawer layout can pull out the page from the side" type="DOUBLE" /> <WidgetItem name="viewpager" example="" summary="Multi-page layout can have multiple pages that can be left and right activities" type="DOUBLE" /> <WidgetItem name="grid" example="" summary="Table layout Table layout layout" type="DOUBLE" />

<WidgetItem name="text" example="" summary="Text control" type="SINGLE" /> <WidgetItem name="button" example="" summary="Button control" type="SINGLE" /> <WidgetItem name="input" example="" summary="[support binding] input box control" type="SINGLE" /> <WidgetItem name="checkbox" example="" summary="[support binding] check box control" type="SINGLE" /> <WidgetItem name="Switch" example="" summary="[support binding] switch control" type="SINGLE" /> <WidgetItem name="spinner" example="" summary="[Support binding] drop-down menu control" type="SINGLE" /> <WidgetItem name="img" example="" summary="Picture control" type="SINGLE" /> <WidgetItem name="radiogroup" example="" summary="Radio group control" type="SINGLE" /> <WidgetItem name="radio" example="" summary="[Support Binding] Single Select Box Control" type="SINGLE" /> <WidgetItem name="seekbar" example="" summary="[Support binding] Drag bar control" type="SINGLE" /> <WidgetItem name="progressbar" example="" summary="Progress bar control" type="SINGLE" /> <WidgetItem name="fab" example="" summary="Floating button control" type="SINGLE" /> <WidgetItem name="card" example="" summary="Card control" type="SINGLE" /> <WidgetItem name="timepicker" example="" summary="Time selection control" type="SINGLE" /> <WidgetItem name="datepicker" example="" summary="Date selection control" type="SINGLE" /> <WidgetItem name="webview" example="" summary="Web control" type="SINGLE" /> <WidgetItem name="appbar" example="" summary="App title bar control" type="SINGLE" /> <WidgetItem name="icon" example="" summary="icon control" type="SINGLE" />

<WidgetItem name="FrameLayout" example="" summary="frame layout" type="DOUBLE" /> <WidgetItem name="LinearLayout" example="" summary="Linear layout" type="DOUBLE" /> <WidgetItem name="ScrollView" example="" summary="Scroll layout" type="DOUBLE" /> <WidgetItem name="RecyclerView" example="" summary="Duplicate layout" type="DOUBLE" /> <WidgetItem name="ConstraintLayout" example="" summary="Constraint layout" type="DOUBLE" /> <WidgetItem name="TableLayout" example="" summary="table layout" type="DOUBLE" /> <WidgetItem name="TableRow" example="" summary="Table row layout" type="DOUBLE" /> <WidgetItem name="CardView" example="" summary="Card layout" type="DOUBLE" /> <WidgetItem name="GridLayout" example="" summary="table layout" type="DOUBLE" /> <WidgetItem name="AppBarLayout" example="" summary="App top bar layout" type="DOUBLE" /> <WidgetItem name="BottomAppBar" example="" summary="Bottom column layout" type="DOUBLE" /> <WidgetItem name="NavigationView" example="" summary="Navigation layout" type="DOUBLE" /> <WidgetItem name="ToolBar" example="" summary="Toolbar layout" type="DOUBLE" /> <WidgetItem name="TabLayout" example="" summary="Switch indicator group" type="DOUBLE" /> <WidgetItem name="TabItem" example="" summary="Toggle indicator" type="DOUBLE" />
